title: Ninjala 2D Cartoon Anime
titleNative: ニンジャラ カートゥーンアニメ
synopsis: Set in the year of 20XX, the series focuses on a group of 9 young rookie ninjas, called the Ninja Gum Kids, who are descendants of ninja clans who have mysteriously disappeared. The Ninja Gum Kids want to achieve one goal: to become master ninjas.

tags.name: Ninja
tags.description: Prominently features Japanese warriors traditionally trained in espionage, sabotage and assasination.

title: Uchuu Camper Chichi
titleNative: 宇宙キャンパー・チッチ
synopsis: Chichi, an ordinary office lady who works in Commercial Sector II of the solar system, heads to a space camp for a vacation. However, she crash-lands on a planet that is a "graveyard" for scrapped ships. (Source: Anime News Network) Note: One of the four short movies created for the Young Animator Training Project Anime no Tane 2022.

synonyms: The Number One Miser of the City
synopsis: Based on a novel A Christmas Carol by Charles Dickens. (Source: AniDB) Note: A Rankin/Bass holiday special, remake of the 1956 musical TV special "The Stingiest Man in Town"

title: Red
synopsis: I conveyed my love and gratitude to a certain deceased physician amidst the COVID-19 outbreak in 2020, while a personal shopper expressed the same emotions from yet a different place. 1st year work 2021, Tokyo University of the Arts, Graduate School of Film and New Media, Department of Animation. (Source: Geidai Animation)

synopsis: Promotion Video from Adobe Creative Cloud for their software suite. The animation is a collab-work by various Japanese experimental animators.

title: Chibikko Remi to Meiken Kapi
titleNative: ちびっ子レミと名犬カピ
synonyms: Little Remi and Famous Dog Kapi
synopsis: Based on Sans Famille by Hector Malot Tells the story of Remi who is sold off to Vitalis the travelling musician and his band of performing animals.

title: Hikari: Kariya wo Tsunagu Monogatari
titleNative: ひかり ~刈谷をつなぐ物語~
synopsis: A short produced by the Kariya City Tourist Association of Aichi Prefecture to promote tourism. It tells the story of a high school ekiden (long-distance road relay running) club and its efforts to prepare for the ward tournament. Since the story takes place in Kariya, viewers will get an idea of the city through the backgrounds. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: Duel Masters Victory
titleNative: デュエル・マスターズ ビクトリー
synopsis: Duel Masters Victory is the 7th season of the Duel Masters anime series. Introducing new protagonist Katta Kirifuda, the brother of Shobu. He wants to be a dueling champion like his brother Shobu, but in his own way. The series shows the beginning of his dueling adventures with his friends, Bucchake, Yohdel and Benchan. During these adventures he considers Dragon Ryu, a fierce duelist, as his rival. This series also features the story behind the battle between the races of Hunters and Aliens.

tags.name: Card Battle
tags.description: Centers around individuals competing in card games.

tags.name: Shounen
tags.description: Target demographic is teenage and young adult males.

title: Ochou Fujin no Gensou
synopsis: Butterfly, a faithful Japanese wife, waits patiently in Nagasaki for the return of her American husband, Pinkerton. She sees the Stars and Stripes fluttering atop an approaching ship and rightly surmises that Pinkerton is onboard. However, the feckless foreigner is arriving in the company of his "real" Caucasian wife, causing the heartbroken Butterfly to commit suicide. This masterpiece of Japanese silhouette animation makes the best of its source material. (Source: The Anime Encyclopedia)

tags.name: Achromatic
tags.description: Contains animation that is primarily done in black and white.

title: Saikyou Onmyouji Mini
synonyms: Saikyou Onmyouji no Isekai Tenseiki Mini
The Reincarnation of the Strongest Exorcist in Another World Mini
最強陰陽師の異世界転生記 みに
synopsis: Mini anime of Saikyou Onmyouji no Isekai Tenseiki shorts posted on the official Twitter.

tags.description: Features a character from a modern-day setting being transported into an alternate world and has to adapt to their new surroundings.

title: Art of Fighting
titleNative: バトルスピリッツ　龍虎の拳
synopsis: After events involving a home invasion, a house cat, an ancient artifact, and an unpaid electrical bill, martial artist Ryo Sakazaki and his best friend Robert Garcia must fight their way into the Southtown underworld to save Ryo's sister Yuri from the crimelord known as Mr. Big.

tags.name: Martial Arts
tags.description: Centers around the use of traditional hand-to-hand combat.

title: The Eternal Aseria
synonyms: Eien no Aseria: The Spirit of Eternity Sword
synopsis: Yuto Takamine and his younger sister-in-law Kaori, were at their parents' grave, when they were suddenly summoned into another world, Phantasmagoria. The King and a woman named Restina took Kaori as a hostage, and ordered Yuto to fight against their enemies. Then, the King gave him a sword called Motomeh to protect their kingdom from enemy spirits. Kaori will only be freed if Yuto helps protect Phantasmagoria. Thus, Yuto's journey begins... (Source: Anime News Network)

tags.name: Swordplay
tags.description: Prominently features the use of swords in combat.

title: Maryuu Senki
synopsis: Once upon a time, there was a certain family having strong influence on the rule of the Imperial Court. They had their own might called "Kidou" and yet got hated because of the might itself. At last, the patriarch of the family was entrapped to his death, and all the family was doomed to ruin... The present day — the survived descendants of this family, now calling themselves "Kidousyuu" schemed to resurrect their murdered patriarch once again, and the ferocious evil spell went into action.

titleNative: 嘆きのアイスキャンディー
synopsis: The end of summer from the perspective of a popsicle.

title: Saru Masamune
synopsis: Short movie from 1930 about a soldier traveling a great distance to deliver a letter. Along the way he receives a sword from a monkey.

tags.name: Military
tags.description: Centered around the life and activities of military personnel.

title: Lance N' Masques
titleNative: ランス・アンド・マスクス
synopsis: Yotaro Hanafusa is a descendent of the “Knights of the World.” With the Knight’s Code of Chivalry hammered into him since childhood, Yotaro cannot stop himself from saving damsels in distress. He wears a mask, and is known on the street as “Knight Lancer” but he has always kept his identity a secret. While on an outing, Yotaro saves a 6-year-old girl, Makio Kidoin, the only child of a powerful business tycoon. When Yotaro discovers that Makio leads a lonely life in a huge estate, he resolves to protect her. He and his friends disguise themselves as lodgers and move into her mansion. (Source: Anime News Network)

tags.name: Chuunibyou
tags.description: Prominently features a character with "Middle School 2nd Year Syndrome", who either acts like a know-it-all adult or falsely believes they have special powers.

title: The Pearl Remains
synopsis: A woman traces her memories through a pearl ring, and comes upon her mother gazing at the same ring. But her memories soon lose their outline and become enclosed within the pearl. 1st year work 2018, Tokyo University of the Arts, Graduate School of Film and New Media, Department of Animation (Source: Geidai Animation)

title: New Year's Card Bonds
synopsis: The video's story comes from greeting card website Nenga Aisatsujo's 6th annual contest, which asks participants to send in their heart-warming New Year's card memories. Sachiyo Okuno wrote the story and won the Japanese Postal Service Award, a new award this year. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: Tobiuo no Boya wa Byoki desu
titleRomaji: Tobiuo no Boya wa Byoki desu
titleNative: トビウオのぼうやはびょうきです
synonyms: My Little Flying Fish is Sick
The Little Flying Fish Gets Sick
synopsis: Based on a picture book of the same name, inspired by the event in which the crew of a japanese fishing boat was affected by the radiation of the H-Bomb, which was being tested by the US military on a site nearby, causing them to develop different types of radiaton diseases. The film follows the story of a flying fish that becomes unable to fly due to the effects of radiation.

tags.name: Animals

title: Dreams into Drawing
synopsis: The painter Kuwagata Keisai lived over 200 years ago. He created 'Ways to Sketch', a series of picture books illustrating humans and animals, all richly expressed. One day he was sketching out a carp, just at that moment he slept and he became a carp in dream. A carp was enjoy to swimming, but a fisherman caught that carp... (Source: Yamamura Animation)

tags.name: Historical
tags.description: Partly or completely set during a real period of world history.

title: KNYACKI!
synopsis: Is a clay animation staring a small caterpillar of mint green named "Knyacki" who is easygoing and likes to go at his own pace in life, but is also full of curiosity.
